name: HUMU Sandwich & Smoothies
tagline: Downtown sandwich shop with a 4.9 Google rating — the Reuben is the best on the island and locals want to keep it secret.
mustOrder: Reuben sandwich — consistently called the best on Oahu
smoothies — surprisingly good for a sandwich shop
parking: Merchant St metered parking; downtown parking garages
talkStory: A small deli on Merchant Street in the financial district with a 4.9 Google rating at nearly 200 reviews — one of the highest-rated food spots on Oahu. The Reuben is the draw: proper corned beef, sauerkraut, Russian dressing, rye bread. One reviewer said they 'wanted to keep it a hidden gem.' Primarily a lunch spot for downtown office workers. Quick service, reasonable prices. Weekday hours only.
